Futuristic archive rebuild

From science-joke tees to signature outerwear, mapped like a mission database.

This version is intentionally much more cinematic and premium. It leans into the movie’s space-science energy with a command-deck UI, animated starfield, featured look callouts, sharper hierarchy, and a true archive feel instead of a basic grid of links.

Professional direction

Less generic. More cinematic. Stronger hierarchy, richer depth, cleaner emphasis, and a real visual identity.

Image handling

Where a frame or useful item image existed, it is used. Where public imagery was thin, the card becomes a stylized data object instead of a fake screenshot.

Best next upgrade

Add hand-curated scene stills and turn the archive into a scene-by-scene wardrobe timeline.
